entity.summary: Decentralized exchange launched on Avalanche in July 2021 under the Trader Joe brand. The protocol expanded through Liquidity Book and multichain deployments, then adopted the LFJ brand while retaining the JOE token and historical protocol lineage.
entity.notes: Canonical name follows the current LFJ brand. Trader Joe is retained as the principal historical alias. The rebrand date is stored at month precision because official current materials establish the transition but do not expose a single definitive cutover-day notice in the reviewed source set.

events.title: Trader Joe launched liquidity incentives on Avalanche
events.description: The exchange launched under the Trader Joe brand on Avalanche, with JOE token emissions and liquidity incentives beginning on 2021-07-03.
events.notes: The emissions start date is used as the clearest operational launch marker.

events.title: Trader Joe adopted the LFJ brand
events.description: The exchange transitioned from the Trader Joe identity to LFJ while preserving the JOE token, existing protocol deployments, and historical product lineage under the new brand.
events.notes: Month-level transition marker. The exact public cutover day remains reviewable rather than asserted as exact.

evidence.title: JOE token emissions
evidence.notes: Official documentation states that token emissions began on 2021-07-03.

evidence.title: Complete summary of the Trader Joe platform on Avalanche
evidence.notes: Historical first-party description of the Trader Joe exchange identity and Avalanche product scope.

evidence.title: Welcome to LFJ
evidence.notes: Current official documentation identifies LFJ as the active DEX brand.

evidence.title: LFJ official publication archive
evidence.notes: First-party publication identity preserves the former Trader Joe name under the LFJ brand.
